recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: The Quintessential Quintuplets Movie

recommendations.title: Into the Night
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Comedy, Action, Crime, Drama, Romance
recommendations.overview: Ed Okin used to have a boring life. He used to have trouble getting to sleep. Then one night, he met Diana. Now, Ed's having trouble staying alive.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: Swing Girls
recommendations.overview: A group of delinquent high school girls form a band when they accidentally poison their school's brass band and have to replace them.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: Threesome

recommendations.title: Smash and Grab
recommendations.overview: After years of toiling away inside the engine room of a towering locomotive, two antiquated robots will risk everything for freedom and for each other.
